title: Event missing metadata — no event_id, timestamp, or source for debugging
expected_feedback: Standard: Event payload lacks mandatory metadata fields. Without event_id, consumer deduplication is impossible (no unique key to check 'already processed'). Without timestamp, event ordering and debugging across services requires Kafka's internal timestamp (which reflects produce-time, not business-event-time). Without source and correlation_id, distributed tracing is blind. Add: event_id (UUID), event_type, timestamp (ISO-8601), source (service name), correlation_id (trace ID), schema_version.
